message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Policy Authorization flow between Smart Edge Open and 5G core

actor "User/Admin" as User

rectangle "Smart Edge Open Controller Components" {
    participant "CLI" as CLI
    participant "Af Microservice" as AfMicroservice
}

rectangle "5G Core Components" {
    participant "NEF" as NEF
    participant "NGC CP Function" as NGCPFunction
}

note right of AfMicroservice: Smart Edge Open provided\nCore component with\nlimited functionality

rectangle "Policy Authorization – Individual Application Session Context creation flow" {
    User -> CLI : Create application session context
    activate CLI
    
    CLI -> AfMicroservice : /af/v1/policy-authorization/app-sessions POST
    activate AfMicroservice
    
    AfMicroservice -> NEF : /npcf-policyauthorization/v1/app-sessions POST
    activate NEF
    
    NEF -> NGCPFunction : 
    activate NGCPFunction
    
    NGCPFunction --> NEF : 201 Created: app-sessionId \ ERROR
    deactivate NGCPFunction
    
    NEF --> AfMicroservice : 201 Created: app-sessionId \ ERROR
    deactivate NEF
    
    AfMicroservice --> CLI : 201 Created: app-sessionId \ ERROR
    deactivate AfMicroservice
    
    CLI --> User : Success: app-sessionId
    deactivate CLI
}

footer Proprietary and Confidential
@enduml
```
